mapper.select: /* wms-master-assort-sql-oracle.xml - selectAssortDetailList */ SELECT ASRT.CTKEY , CT.CTNM , ASRT.OWKEY , OW.OWNM , ASRT.ASRTDTICKEY , IC.ICNM AS ASRTDTICNM , ASRT.QTY , ASRT.COLOR , ASRT.DESIGN , ASRT.CHRT , ASRT.INSERTDATE , ASRT.INSERTURKEY , ASRT.UPDATEDATE , ASRT.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_ASRT ASRT INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = ASRT.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON OW.OWKEY = ASRT.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IC.CTKEY = ASRT.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ASRT.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ASRT.ASRTDTICKEY WHERE ASRT.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND ASRT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ASRT.ASRTMASICKEY = #{asrtmasickey}
